name: blueman
title: blueman
description:
Graphical bluetooth manager
Blueman is a GTK+ bluetooth management utility for GNOME using bluez D-Bus
backend.

commands.name: blueman-adapters
commands.description: an utility to set adapter properties

arguments.description: an utility to set adapter properties
arguments.raw: -adapters  an utility to set adapter properties

commands.name: blueman-applet
commands.description: a tray applet for managing bluetooth

commands.name: blueman-sendto
commands.description: application for sending files to bluetooth devices

commands.name: blueman-tray
commands.description: a status icon application for blueman

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use blueman-adapters because Graphical bluetooth manager.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use blueman-adapters as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `blueman-adapters [adapter]` as documented upstream for blueman-adapters.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair blueman-adapters with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `blueman-adapters --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -adapters
arguments.description: an utility to set adapter properties
